what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named vt-architects/p-4 in the design-source channel, holding identifiers, a blob reference, MIME type, source label, author session, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter defines id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime, source, author_session, and created timestamp
Width and height are both 0 despite mime being image/jpeg
standouts: Image metadata stub for a design-source ground-truth asset
Zero width and height values for an image record
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with ledger-style fields (id, address, channel, path, blob, mime)
Uses URI schemes image:// and blob://
Includes author_session and ISO 8601 created timestamp
concerns: w and h are 0, which is unusual for an image/jpeg record and may indicate missing or uncomputed dimensions
Body is minimal and contains no description of image content
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
notes: A sparse, addressable ledger stub for a design-source image whose dimensions have not been captured.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What visual content does vt-architects/p-4.jpg contain?
Is the dimension omission intentional or a data-quality gap?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is SOURCE design ground-truth metadata; actual content is a sparse image metadata stub with missing dimensions, so it partially fulfills that purpose.
intention_signals: The file appears to be registering a design-source image in the ledger so it can be addressed, attributed to an author session, and retrieved via its blob reference.
contribution: Provides an addressable image record with a stable blob reference, source channel, and authorship metadata that a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the image vt-architects/p-4.jpg in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:e0939218ae4305f9d4d42f4ca790e0eb with zero dimensions and an author session.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design ground-truth image asset with identifiers, blob reference, and provenance for retrieval and fusion.
